content.full_text:
EIC TRANSMITTAL OF CORRESPONDENCE

CORRESPONDENT [illegible] Island Council - c/o Mr. [illegible]

DATE 2/11                                RE: [illegible] helping [illegible]-
                                          (2/8) Intermittent Compa[illegible]
COPY TO:

ADMINISTRATION                CONFLICT                    ENFORCEMENT
_BOB T.                       _DEL          _DAWN         _BOB S.
_LINDA                        _ED                         _RICK
_JUDY                         _KEN G.                     _BARBARA
                              _AL                         _FRED

EXECUTIVE                     LEGAL                       TA&A
_DAN                          _KEN F.                     _JOHN K.
_MICKEY                       _NATALIE                    _NAN
_CARLA                        _TED                        _GINA (circled)
_JEANNE                       _MIKE                       _MARY ANN
                                                          _JOHN G.
                                                          _JAY
                                                          _RICH


[illegible]                    Please

___ Take whatever action you consider appropriate
___ Reply direct by ________________________cc:_____________________
___ Prepare suggested reply and return to_________________________
___ Coordinate reply with

                                          2/11/77
                                          Called Delmont
                                          Smith in Rehab
                                          Unit - he said he
                                          is away for next
                                          two wks and not a
                                          transfer issue
                                          Use


77-02-177

ROLAND E. SMITH
CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANT
401 NORTH BRAND BOULEVARD — SUITE 614
GLENDALE, CALIFORNIA 91203

(213) 245-9519

February 8, 1977
MEMBER OF
AMERICAN INSTITUTE OF CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS
CALIFORNIA SOCIETY OF CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Gentlemen:                                Re: Off Year Reporting for
                                             Campaign Committees

The Antonovich Assembly Campaign has been assessed a contribution
to the Republican Caucus. Does this assessment alter the off-year
reporting schedule for the Antonovich Assembly Campaign?

If so, please advise the dates and periods covered for the revised
reporting schedule.

                                             Sincerely yours,


                                             Roland E. Smith

RES/mad

embedding.qa_text: This document is an internal correspondence form used for transmitting and tracking responses to external communications. Here's a breakdown of the key elements: **Header:** - **CORRESPONDENT:** Roland E. Smith - CPA, Kildeare - **DATE:** 2-11 - **RE:** Campaign voting schedule - **COPY TO:** (2-8) Antonovich Campaign **Distribution List:** - **ADMINISTRATION:** - BOB T. - LINDA - JUDY - **EXECUTIVE:** - DAN - MICKEY - CARLA - JEANNE - **CONFLICT:** - DEL - DAWN - ED - KEN G. - AL - **LEGAL:** - KEN F. - NATALIE - TED - MIKE - **ENFORCEMENT:** - BOB S. - RICK - BARBARA - FRED - **TA&A:** - JOHN K. - NAN - GINA - MARY ANN - JOHN G. - JAY - RICH **Instructions:** - **Please take whatever action you consider appropriate.** - **Reply direct by [date] --cc: [name]** - **Prepare suggested reply and return to [name]** - **Coordinate reply with [name]** **Handwritten Notes:** - 2-14-77 - Called Roland Smith re requirement to fill other than off-year report. Since amendment is only TSO and not a direct news item, Antonovich has knowledge. **File Reference:** - 77-02-177 February 8, 1977 Fair Political Practices Commission 1100 K Street Sacramento, California 95814 Gentlemen: Re: Off Year Reporting for Campaign Committees The Antonovich Assembly Campaign has been assessed a contribution to the Republican Caucus. Does this assessment alter the off-year reporting schedule for the Antonovich Assembly Campaign? If so, please advise the dates and periods covered for the revised reporting schedule. Sincerely yours, Roland E. Smith
